name: Crossbeam Ventures
notes: Crossbeam Venture Partners — joint venture between Treville Capital Group and Moelis Asset Management. HQ New York City. Domain matches input.

name: DCM
notes: DCM Ventures — founded 1996, $4.5B AUM, early-stage tech VC headquartered in Menlo Park, CA.

name: Divergent
notes: Divergent (formerly Divergent 3D) — AI-enabled digital manufacturing for automotive, aerospace, and defense. HQ Torrance, CA. Raised $290M Series E in 2025 at $2.3B valuation.

name: Dynamo Ventures
notes: Dynamo Ventures — seed-stage logistics and supply chain VC based in Chattanooga, TN. Founded 2016.

name: Ebay Ventures
notes: eBay Ventures — corporate VC arm of eBay Inc., headquartered at eBay's HQ in San Jose, CA. Founded 2022. Focuses on commerce, marketplaces, and ecommerce enablers.

name: Elysian Park
notes: Elysian Park Ventures — founded 2014, invests at the intersection of sports, health, culture, and technology. HQ Los Angeles, CA.

name: Entrepreneurs First
notes: Entrepreneurs First (EF) — international talent investor headquartered in London, UK. Has offices in London, Paris, Bangalore, and San Francisco. Founded 2011. Not a US HQ company.

name: Equal Ventures
notes: Equal Ventures — NYC-based VC investing in tech startups in legacy industries (climate, insurance, retail, supply chain). HQ at 155 West 23rd Street, New York.

name: Essence VC
notes: Essence Venture Capital — founded 2019, Seattle WA. Invests in early-stage startups in AI, ML, big data, data infrastructure, and developer tools.

name: Evercore
notes: Evercore Inc. — global independent investment banking advisory firm headquartered in New York City. Publicly traded (EVR). Not strictly FinTech but closest standard label; alternatively 'Investment Banking'.

name: Ex Ante
notes: ex/ante — pre-seed VC founded 2022, focused on agentic technology, AI, cybersecurity, web3, and fintech. Listed HQ as Brooklyn, NY by some sources; New York City by others.

name: Exponent Capital
notes: Best match is Exponent Founders Capital (also branded as 'Exponent Capital') — NYC-based VC founded by Plaid and Robinhood alums, raised $125M across two funds. Focus: enterprise software, fintech, infrastructure, applied AI. Name-only ambiguity: no domain in input.
